extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Manage your plugins and content providers.
extensions.noExtensionsFound: No extensions found matching your criteria.
extensions.marketplaceDescription: Explore and install extensions from the repository.
extensions.repositoryUrlHelp: Enter the URL of the repository JSON file.
extensions.updateRepositoryAlertDesc: To protect Seanime, some extensions have been removed. Find a new repository URL online and add it.
extensions.seanimeAutoSelectAnime: Seanime will automatically select the best match based on anime titles.
extensions.seanimeAutoSelectManga: Seanime will automatically select the best match based on manga titles.

types.customSourcesInfo1: Custom sources do not provide streaming functionality. Torrent and online streaming providers are needed for this.
types.customSourcesInfo2: Custom sources allow you to explore media beyond what AniList offers.

addModal.title: Add extensions
addModal.installFromUrlDesc: Install an extension by entering the manifest URL.
addModal.bulkImportHint: You can also install many extensions at once by importing from a repository.
addModal.importFromRepoDesc: Automatically import and install extensions by entering a repository URL.

addExtensionModal.title: Add extension
addExtensionModal.description: Enter the URL of the extension's .js or .json file.

userConfig.title: Extension configuration
userConfig.editPreferencesDesc: You can edit the preferences for this extension here.
userConfig.fillRequiredConfig: Fill out the required configuration options.

card.codeDescription: You can edit the extension code here.
card.author: Author: {author}
card.pluginIsRequesting: The plugin {name} is requesting the following permissions:
card.unsafeWarning: This plugin uses unsafe flags. Seanime cannot guarantee it is safe to use.
card.failedToLoad: Seanime could not load this extension. If you're unsure what this means, contact the author.
card.incompatibleVersion: Incompatible with this version of Seanime

toast.failedToFetchExtensions: Failed to fetch extensions from the provided URL
toast.resetToDefaultMarketplace: Default marketplace URL has been restored
toast.failedToFetchExtensionsDefault: Failed to fetch extensions from the default URL
toast.skippedUnsafeFlags: Skipped "{extensionID}" because it uses unsafe flags. Update it manually.
